$description: Sink-semantics registry — cognium-dev #139 Tier A. Each entry maps a <ClassName>#<methodName> signature to the sink's real behavior class and the list of SinkType labels that must be dropped when that signature is emitted with that label. Consumed by SinkSemanticsPass (canonical #109). Simple-name class match; fully-qualified receiver types are reduced to the tail segment. Missing sink.class (unresolved receiver) falls through — the gate is false-negative-safe.

sinks.note: Redis wire-protocol serialization, not OS exec
Jedis abstract Connection base — same shape as Jedis.executeCommand
Jedis cluster client — same shape as Jedis.executeCommand
RxJava functional dispatch, not OS exec
RxJava Action0 dispatch
RxJava Action1 dispatch
sun.misc.Unsafe JDK-internal reflective bridge — not attacker-controllable input
java.lang.invoke.MethodHandle — JDK-internal, not attacker-controllable
Spring Data MongoDB template — BSON serialization, not SQL / shell. Added 3.153.0 (#233).
Spring Data MongoDB interface — same shape as MongoTemplate
Mongo driver collection — BSON operation dispatch
DataStax Cassandra driver — CQL statement dispatch (SQL-injection remains valid; command_injection alias is dropped)
Spring Data Redis template — RESP protocol dispatch, not SQL / shell
Spring Data Redis string-specialised template — same shape as RedisTemplate
Redisson Redis client — RESP dispatch
Lettuce Redis driver connection — RESP dispatch
Spring Data Redis connection interface — RESP dispatch
java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService — Runnable dispatch, not OS exec. JDK concurrency executor callback dispatch. Added 3.153.0 (cognium-dev #233).
JDK ThreadPoolExecutor — Runnable dispatch
JDK ForkJoinPool — Runnable/ForkJoinTask dispatch
JDK ScheduledExecutorService — Runnable dispatch
Spring TaskExecutor — Runnable dispatch, not OS exec
Spring AsyncTaskExecutor — Runnable dispatch
Spring TransactionTemplate — TransactionCallback dispatch, not raw SQL / shell
Android / Netty Handler — Runnable dispatch, not OS exec
